overlap_verdict: Unclear; likely related to DS088 IFX comparator but not publicly proven by subject ID
recommended_overlap_notes: GSE16879 profiles 61 Leuven/TARGID IBD patients before and 4-6 weeks after first infliximab, including 24 UC patients on GPL570. DS088/GSE73661 includes a 23-patient UC IFX comparator before and W4-6 after first IFX on GPL6244. Same institution/authors, same first-IFX timing, same response definition, and nearly matching UC cohort size suggest DS088 may be a reprofiled or partially overlapping UC subset of DS061, but public GEO identifiers differ and no public subject-level crosswalk was found. Do not count the DS061 UC IFX subset and DS088 IFX comparator as independent IFX-response cohorts without manual subject/sample reconciliation.
manual_review_notes: Only source-level participant IDs, lab sample sheets, or original investigator metadata can resolve whether the 23 DS088 IFX subjects are a subset/reprofile of the 24 DS061 UC IFX subjects.

overlap_verdict: Unclear; likely related to DS061 UC IFX subset but not publicly proven by subject ID
recommended_overlap_notes: GSE73661 is primarily a GEMINI vedolizumab UC expression study, but it also contains a 23-patient UC IFX comparator sampled before and W4-6 after first IFX. This IFX comparator closely matches the DS061/GSE16879 UC first-IFX design, but public sample labels use Bp###_*_IFX_* identifiers rather than GSE16879 UCR/UCNR labels, and the public article/supplement records checked do not expose a direct crosswalk. Treat the IFX comparator as likely related but unconfirmed overlap with DS061; keep countability Unclear and do not use as an independent IFX validation cohort without manual subject-level confirmation.
manual_review_notes: Only source-level participant IDs, lab sample sheets, or original investigator metadata can resolve whether the 23 DS088 IFX subjects are a subset/reprofile of the 24 DS061 UC IFX subjects.
